query:
-- ── sanad_offices: drop old columns, add new provider columns ──────────────────
ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS companyId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS managerId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS openingHours;

ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerType ENUM(
    'pro_office','typing_centre','admin_bureau','legal_services',
    'attestation','visa_services','business_setup','other'
  ) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pro_office' AFTER id,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description TEXT AFTER nameAr,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS website VARCHAR(255) AFTER email,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contactPerson VARCHAR(255) AFTER website,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rating DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0 AFTER services,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalOrders INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER rating,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS openingHours VARCHAR(255) AFTER totalOrders,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isVerified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE AFTER openingHours,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notes TEXT AFTER isVerified;

-- Change status default from pending_approval to active
ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('active','inactive','pending_approval','suspended') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active';

-- ── sanad_applications: migrate to work order model ────────────────────────────
-- Drop old columns
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS officeId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicantId,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicationNumber,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS type,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicantName,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS applicantNameAr;

-- Add new columns
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerId INT AFTER companyId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requestedById INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER providerId,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS referenceNumber VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE AFTER requestedById,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS serviceType ENUM(
    'work_permit','work_permit_renewal','work_permit_cancellation',
    'labor_card','labor_card_renewal',
    'residence_visa','residence_visa_renewal','visit_visa','exit_reentry',
    'commercial_registration','commercial_registration_renewal','business_license',
    'document_typing','document_translation','document_attestation',
    'pasi_registration','omanisation_report','other'
  ) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other' AFTER referenceNumber,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS title VARCHAR(255) AFTER serviceType,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS beneficiaryName VARCHAR(255) AFTER priority,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS beneficiaryNameAr VARCHAR(255) AFTER beneficiaryName,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS employeeId INT AFTER passportNumber,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS providerNotes TEXT AFTER notes,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rating INT AFTER fees,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ratingComment TEXT AFTER rating;

-- Update status enum to new values
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM(
    'draft','submitted','in_progress','awaiting_documents',
    'awaiting_payment','completed','rejected','cancelled'
  ) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft';

-- Add referenceNumber values for existing rows that have none
UPDATE sanad_applications SET referenceNumber = CONCAT('SAN-MIGR-', id) WHERE referenceNumber IS NULL;

-- Add new indexes
ALTER TABLE sanad_applications
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sanad_provider (providerId),
  ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sanad_service_type (serviceType);

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rating INT AFTER fees,

  MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM(

-- Add referenceNumber values for existing rows that have none
UPDATE sanad_applications SET referenceNumber = CONCAT('SAN-MIGR-', id) WHERE referenceNumber IS NULL;
